creator: eagriff@global2000.net
text:
This used to depend on targets that are no longer in the
ports tree. They are:

	Date::Format, File::Sync, and Mail::Internet.

	It may either need an update, targets re-added to the tree,
	or be obsolete?

Fix: 

Needs either update, or other p5-'s.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/mail/p5-Mail-Folder
	make # watch for messages in configure stage.
